site.title: Vas Kuruganti | System & Software Architect
site.metaDescription: Vas Kuruganti builds AI infrastructure, distributed systems, and reliability platforms for production-scale environments.
site.footerText: © 2026 Vas Kuruganti. Built for GitHub Pages.

headline: AI Enginering & Infrastructure.
AgenticAI and AI development.
Distributed systems.
Reliability at scale.
hero.subhead: I build the systems that make intelligent systems possible.
hero.copy: I work across AI development, AgenticAI, AI infrastructure, cloud platforms, site reliability engineering, and software architecture. My focus is simple: build systems that are scalable, observable, resilient, and ready for production.

photo.caption: Architecting AI platforms, cloud systems, and production reliability.

about.title: I design systems where software, infrastructure, and intelligence meet.
about.subtitle: Over fifteen years, I’ve worked across software engineering, Building and training models from Data, AgenticAI, infrastructure architecture, distributed systems, and reliability engineering.
about.copy: My background spans enterprise platforms, cloud-native systems, AgenticAI, automation, observability, AI development, and production infrastructure for machine learning workloads. I studied engineering in India and earned a Master of Engineering from Boston University, where I focused on machine learning, signal processing, complex systems, and distributed computing.

feature.title: Large-scale platforms for AI and the enterprise.
feature.subtitle: At Broadcom, I design and build distributed AI infrastructure systems, scale AI agents, and improve the reliability and performance of enterprise platforms.
feature.copy: My work cuts across AI Engineering, system architecture, cloud-native environments, automation, and infrastructure tooling. I collaborate across engineering teams to improve scalability, operational resilience, and performance under real production constraints.

specs.title: AI Engineering & Infrastructure
specs.text: Platform design for inference, agents, and production AI systems.

specs.title: Distributed systems
specs.text: Architecture for scale, fault tolerance, and operational durability.

specs.title: Reliability engineering
specs.text: Observability, triage, autoremediation, and incident reduction.

specs.title: Cloud automation
specs.text: Tooling and workflows that make complex platforms easier to run.

projects.title: AI development
projects.description: As a founding engineer, I built AI systems that used ML inference to support cancer diagnosis. I also helped build reliable platform infrastructure for foundational models and AGI-oriented inference pipelines.

projects.title: Platform reliability
projects.description: I design monitoring, triage, and autoremediation frameworks that reduce production incidents and improve resilience across distributed systems.

projects.title: AI development
projects.description: I specialize in building AI/ML systems from scratch—turning annotated data and GPU infrastructure into trained and fine-tuned models, productionizing them through scalable inference platforms, and driving adoption through copilots and agentic AI system

projects.title: Cloud platforms for AI
projects.description: I architect and scale cloud platforms for AI workloads, enabling high-performance, production-grade inference at scale.

writing.title: Ideas about platforms, infrastructure, and engineering strategy.
writing.subtitle: I write about platform engineering, systems architecture, technical leadership, and the organizational leverage that comes from building the right infrastructure.

links.label: Read "Platform Engineering as an Organizational Strategy"

secondaryTiles.title: Built with modern infrastructure.
secondaryTiles.description: Python, Go, Java, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, Ansible, Terraform, StackStorm, Prometheus, Grafana, and the systems thinking needed to connect them into something that works.

secondaryTiles.title: Focused on what matters next.
secondaryTiles.description: Distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, platform engineering, reliability engineering, and machine learning systems.

contact.title: Let’s build something that lasts.
contact.copy: Reach out if you’re working on AI infrastructure, distributed systems, reliability engineering, platform design, or technical leadership challenges that need both depth and systems thinking.
